calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: P. CALDWELL, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF; LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY JOAN KUBOTA, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT PHILLIP CARRERA WHO IS ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. PARTIES ENTER INTO A SIGNED AGREEMENT WHICH IS NOT FILED; SETTLEMENT TERMS ARE CONTAINED IN THE SIGNED AGREEMENT FOR PREMISES LOCATED AT 1550 EDDY STREET, #513, S.F., CA 94115. TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT INCLUDE DEFENDANT PHILLIP CARRERA TO VACATE BY FEB-14-06 BY 5:00PM; DEFENDANT TO PAY BACK RENT FOR DECEMBER 2005 AND FOR JANUARY 2006 IN THE AMOUNT TOTALING $3070.00 BY MAKING PAYMENTS OF $100.00 PER MONTH. ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS ARE WAIVED; THE $99.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT IS TO BE APPLIED TO THE FIRST PAYMENT ON MAR-01-2006; THE FIRST ACTUAL PAYMENT FROM DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF WILL BE ON APR-01-2006 IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. RENT IS WAIVED FROM FEB-01-2006 TO FEB-14-2006.

PRO TEM JUDGE CATHY MOSSBRUCKER; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (218).
